text.tspan: Living wage assumes two parents with
two children, and represents the hourly
Data source: Government of Canada Minimum Wage Database (2025), Living Wage Canada (2025), Alternatives North (2022),
Institut de recherche et d’informations socioéconomiques (2025) Living Income report, Yukon News (2025).
*Montreal reflects a single adult household. Largest cities of each province were chosen for local living wage where data was
available. No local living wage available in Nunavut.
